name: Lizzie
bio:
Lizzie’s story is filled with love, resilience, and deep devotion. Lizzie was born with spina bifida. She is blind, deaf, and needs hands-on care for every daily task. Her complex medical needs require constant attention and support.

Michele, a former nurse, first cared for Lizzie and her birth mother during a difficult medical time. She even welcomed them into her home. When it became clear that Lizzie needed a permanent family, Michele did not hesitate. She chose love.

Today, Michele is a single mother in her sixties. She is recently retired, faces her own health challenges, and cares for Lizzie full-time.

Bathing is one of their toughest challenges. Lifting Lizzie, who weighs 100 pounds, in and out of the bathtub is exhausting and increasingly unsafe. Yet, the bathroom is Lizzie’s happiest place, where Moana music brings comfort, joy, and peace.

SOARD can make this space safe and special: an accessible bathroom to protect Michele and comfort Lizzie. With your donations, we can build a roll-in shower, widen the doorway, and install grab bars to help support Lizzie. These improvements will create a safe, joyful place for both.

Join us today in making a real and immediate impact for Michele and Lizzie. Your generous gift will give them the safe, accessible bathroom they urgently need—transforming their daily struggle into comfort and joy. Donate now to improve their lives.
heroSummary: Lizzie was born with spina bifida and is blind and deaf, requiring full-time care. A safe, accessible bathroom will protect her and her mom while creating a comforting space filled with the joy she loves.
